candidates.title: Audit gap: require_template=True gates all candidates when registry is empty
candidates.description: Template audit identified gap: require_template=True gates all candidates when registry is empty. AutonomousLanePolicy.require_template=True (default). CandidateEvaluator.evaluate() lines 499-508: when find_matching() returns [], candidate.matching_template_id='', checks['template_exists']=False, reasons.append('no matching template found'). All candidates are blocked.

evidence.detail: gap_id=gap-2, severity=critical, title=require_template=True gates all candidates when registry is empty

candidates.expected_delta: Close audit gap: require_template=True gates all candidates when registry is empty
candidates.recommended_next_step: Phase 4 — seed templates so find_matching() returns non-empty results

candidates.title: Audit gap: Only existing template data record is at wrong path
candidates.description: Template audit identified gap: Only existing template data record is at wrong path. tpl-0b21c294 lives at data/umh/trials/proof_templates/template_candidates.jsonl. Runtime registry loads from data/umh/organism/templates/template_candidates.jsonl. These paths have no overlap. The one proof template has never been loadable at runtime.

evidence.detail: gap_id=gap-3, severity=high, title=Only existing template data record is at wrong path

candidates.expected_delta: Close audit gap: Only existing template data record is at wrong path
candidates.recommended_next_step: Phase 4 — seed proper templates to organism/templates/ with real evidence

candidates.title: Audit gap: Zero templates exist for any of the 15 TemplateType values
candidates.description: Template audit identified gap: Zero templates exist for any of the 15 TemplateType values. 15 TemplateType values are defined. CandidateBuilder._enrich_with_template() uses find_matching(action_type, description) which infers template_type and matches on that. With 0 templates of any type, every find_matching() call returns []. Even after gap-1 is fixed, every template type needed by real candidates must have at least one seeded instance.

evidence.detail: gap_id=gap-5, severity=high, title=Zero templates exist for any of the 15 TemplateType values

candidates.expected_delta: Close audit gap: Zero templates exist for any of the 15 TemplateType values
candidates.recommended_next_step: Phase 4 — seed at minimum: MAINTENANCE_ACTION, CONTRADICTION_FIX, READINESS_IMPROVEMENT, OBSERVATION_ACCURACY_FIX, WORLD_MODEL_ACCURACY_FIX
